MOTION Motion For Order To Have Costs Taxed By Court.
Off Calendar Apr-03-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Judge: Thomas J. Mellon, Jr.; Clerk: Dan MacDuff; Reporter: June Leathley; Bailiff: Louise Pierotti. Appearing for plaintiff: Daniel Berko, Esq.; Appearing for defendant: Louis Gianinni, Esq. The court hears oral argument. Defendant's Motion to Tax is denied as moot in light of the courts ruling on defendant's motion for new trial or JNOV.

Plaintiff'S Motion For New Trial
Off Calendar Apr-03-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Judge: Thomas J. Mellon, Jr.; Clerk: Dan MacDuff; Reporter: June Leathley; Bailiff: Louise Pierotti. Appearing for plaintiff: Daniel Berko, Esq.; Appearing for defendant: Louis Gianinni, Esq. The court hears oral argument. Plaintiff's motion for new trial is denied.

MOTION Notice Of Motion For Judgment Not Withstanding The Verdict And For New Trial
Off Calendar Apr-03-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Judge: Thomas J. Mellon, Jr.; Clerk: Dan MacDuff; Reporter: June Leathley; Bailiff: Louise Pierotti. Appearing for plaintiff: Daniel Berko, Esq.; Appearing for defendant: Louis Gianinni, Esq. The court hears oral argument. The motion for JNOV is granted on the grounds that the damage award was excessive. New trial is granted as to all issues, unless plaintiff agrees to accept a total award not exceeding $100,000.00.
